grant_title: New Jersey’s Afterschool and Out-of-School Time (OST) Professional Network
project_area: Afterschool and out-of-school time (OST) programs, youth development, and professional training
demographic_requirements: Focus on youth ages 12–18, particularly in mental health and inclusion initiatives
eligibility_summary: Open to organizations and individuals involved in afterschool and out-of-school time programs in New Jersey, with a focus on professional development, youth mental health, and inclusive practices.
